changelog: App launcher label is now flavor-specific. Official installs show "HushTV Official" in the launcher / Settings → Apps; the bleeding-edge dev channel now shows "HushTV Dev" so you can tell which one you have at a glance.

Carries over all v1.44.37 fixes — DTS / AC3 / EAC3 audio support for previously-silent movies, Cloud DVR with 5-hour quota, no-EPG record block, right-edge dark-scene line glitch fix, and the long-press OK channel actions sheet.
